LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BITAH H. HONARMAND IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR BITAH H. HONARMAND HAS TRACED THE LEVIED FUNDS TO AN EXEMPT SOURCE, HIS SOCIAL SECURITY BENEFITS. (CCP 703.080(B).) THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ALL FUNDS LEVIED FROM WELLS FARGO BANK TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR BITAH H. HONARMAND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption ( Xwage Garnishment Enforcement Of Judgment)
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jessica L. Chylik, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.938.6552, for defendant.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted in part. $100 per month shall be withheld from Defendant's wages. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption ( Xwage Garnishment Enforcement Of Judgment)
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Continued To May-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Bitah Honarmand is continued to May 12, 2015 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =(HK/302)

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. The Claim Of Exemption of Judgment Debtor Bitah H. Honarmand is granted. Judgment Debtor Bitah H. Honarmand has traced the levied funds to an exempt source, his Social Security benefits. (CCP 703.080(b).) The Sheriff is directed to release all funds levied from Wells Fargo Bank to Judgment Debtor Bitah H. Honarmand. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Continued To Jun-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ASHLEY WINSTROM, ESQ., 916.920.2295 X128, FOR PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET AQUISITION CORPORATION.
MARK O. ROREM, ESQ., 415.438.4658, FOR DEFENDANT BITAH HONARMAND.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR BITAH HONARMAND'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION TO JUNE 10, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark O. Rorem, Esq. of the Law Office of Mark O. Rorem, Tel. 415.438.4658, for defendant/claimant Bitah A. Honarmand (also present in court);
No other appearance.

RULING: Claimant presented the court with additional documentation of her expenses. The matter was discussed. After hearing, and to the satisfaction of the court, Defendant Bitah A. Honarmand's Claim Of Exemption is granted. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
